changes: Thrill of War: Duration has been reduced from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War II≫: Duration has been reduced from 25 seconds to 20 seconds; HP increase has been reduced from 15% to 10%.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War III≫: HP increase has been reduced from 25% to 20%; HP restoration has been reduced from 15% to 10%.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War III≫: HP restoration has been reduced from 25% to 20%.
Weapon Throw: Can now only be used by gladiator, marauder, paladin, warrior, and dark knight.
Thrill of War: Duration has been reduced from 20 seconds to 15 seconds.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War II≫: Duration has been reduced from 25 seconds to 20 seconds; HP increase has been reduced from 15% to 10%.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War III≫: HP increase has been reduced from 25% to 20%; HP restoration has been reduced from 15% to 10%.
≪Enhanced Thrill of War III≫: HP restoration has been reduced from 25% to 20%.
Weapon Throw: Can now only be used by gladiator, marauder, paladin, warrior, and dark knight.

Enliven: This weaponskill will no longer restore TP, and instead will remove directional requirements from all other weaponskills; Recast time has been reduced from 240 seconds to 150 seconds; Now has a duration of 10 seconds.
≪Enhanced Enliven≫: Recast time has been reduced from 180 seconds to 120 seconds.
≪Enhanced Enliven II≫: Duration increased to 15 seconds.
Weapon Throw: Can no longer be used.

new_content.name: Palace of the Dead
new_content.description: An ever-changing deep dungeon where players start at level 1 and progress through floors to gain strength, leveling up to 60 within the instance.
new_content.npc_location: Wood Wailer expeditionary (South Shroud, Quarrymill X:25.2 Y:20.6)

new_content.name: The House That Death Built
new_content.description: Side story quest required to access the Palace of the Dead.

new_content.name: The Nightmare's End
new_content.description: Side story quest required to progress further in the Palace of the Dead.

new_content.name: The Feast (Season Two)
new_content.description: Competitive PvP season featuring solo and party rankings with seasonal rewards.

new_content.name: Fields of Glory (Shatter)
new_content.description: PvP battlefield map adjustments including victory requirement changes and balance adjustments.

new_content.name: Ranked PvP
new_content.description: New achievement subcategory added to the Battle category.
